description: Phase 9 Task 1 spike: Apple AMX (Accelerate cblas_sgemm FP32) vs hand-written NEON FMLA (FP32) and SDOT (INT8) on the four critical 650M GEMM shapes, M=512, Apple M3 Pro.

findings.implication: AMX-INT8 (BNNS, ~2x AMX-FP32) projects to ~2x our SDOT -> Task 5.5 (opt-in Apple-AMX backend) is a GO for Mac. Our NEON FMLA FP32 has large headroom too.
